subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Water velocity within cold water service pipework must not exceed 3 metres per second for no less than 99% of the time that water is required during the peak hour.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Water velocity within cold water valves and devices must ensure the correct functioning of fixtures and appliances.

callout.p: The velocity limit contained in B1P2 is an upper limit value and does not necessarily represent a suitable velocity for water service components, equipment and pipework materials. Confirmation should be sought on suitable velocities for products and any specific design and installation criteria.
It is recognised that not all water service components are selected based on the 99th percentile flowrate.
